title: Easy More Hearts
description: Mod that add craftable hearts that you can eat and gain more hearts ( non pernament)
body:
There are hearts :

10-15

15-20

20-25

30-40

40-50

GODLY ( VERY EXPENSIVE ) Up to 500 ( gives 5 hearts )

And NEW Absorption Heart ( Gives 4 Absorption Hearts for level - Unlimited )

Golden apple - 1

Totem - 4

Enchanted Golden Apple - 16



There is also Ender Dragon Drop

Soul sand : 89%

Netherite Ingot : 10%

Dragon Egg : 1%



Use JEI for recipes
